name: posthog-pp-mcp
description: Every PostHog resource in one CLI — with offline search, agent-native output, and cross-resource analytics no dashboard exposes.
long_description: posthog-pp-mcp exposes the full PostHog API surface to agents as two intent-grouped tools: posthog_search (offline or live resource lookup) and posthog_execute (any CLI command with structured JSON output). Built-in compound analytics commands cover flag blast-radius, rollout health, LLM cost attribution, persons at-risk, event property drift, experiment pre-check, stale flags, and dashboard health.

POSTHOG_PERSONAL_APIKEY_AUTH.description: PostHog personal API key (phx_...). Get yours at https://app.posthog.com/settings/user-api-keys
